core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Notion structure, Linear precision, and Apple Fitness visuals.
Emotion First: The app should feel like a 'Control Center' - disciplined, calm, and powerful.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Use density for information, but whitespace for focus.
Negative Space: Use 'Bento' grids to organize complex data without clutter.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter' everywhere - mix with Monospace for data.
No generic center alignment - use grid alignment.
No 100% pure black backgrounds without texture or borders.
No default Shadcn shadows - use 1px borders and subtle glows.

rules: Uppercase Labels: Tracking wide (0.1em), Text-xs, Weight 600, Color Muted.

gradients.finance_card: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1), transparent 40%)
gradients.habit_card: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1), transparent 40%)

grid_strategy.dashboard: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 auto-rows-[180px]

containers.card_style: bg-card border border-border/40 rounded-xl hover:border-border/80 transition-colors duration-200
containers.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border/40 sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

data_display.progress_ring: Use Recharts PieChart for 'Apple Fitness' style rings. Stroke width: 10px, background stroke opacity: 0.1
data_display.charts: Minimalist lines, no grid lines, minimal axes. Tooltip: dark bg, white text.

motion.micro_interactions: Active items should have a subtle 'press' effect (scale 0.98).

universal_guidelines: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT use 'transparent' background for dropdowns/modals - use solid dark colors with borders.
Ensure 3:1 contrast ratio for all text.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config with the provided color palette overrides for 'dark' mode.
2. Create the Layout Shell (Sidebar + Header + Main Content Area) using the 'containers' guidelines.
3. Implement the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy.
4. Build the Finance Tracker using 'Linear' style dense lists and simple charts.
5. Build the Habit Tracker using 'Apple Fitness' style rings (Recharts).
6. Ensure all hardcoded text is in Ukrainian.
7. Use the provided image URLs for the login page background.
